name: Noble Knight's Spearholder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>槍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>持</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ち
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Level 8 or lower monster you control; its name becomes "Fleur Synchron", also it is treated as a Tuner, until the End Phase. You can Tribute this card; add 1 Equip Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Noble Knight's Spearholder" once per turn.
